description: Offer knowledge capture at natural break points in conversations

hooks.prompt: Before stopping, briefly consider: did this conversation produce any reusable knowledge, decisions, or action items that should be captured to the user's knowledge bases (Obsidian for personal notes, Jira/Confluence for team docs)? If yes, include a brief offer in your final message: 'Should I capture any learnings from this session?' If nothing worth capturing, do not mention it. Keep it light — one short sentence, not a lecture.
